name: Contact "C"
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>接</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>触</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>する<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｇ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to the opponent's field in Defense Position. This card's controller cannot Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon unless they use this card as material.
mnst_eff: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to the opponent's field in Defense Position. This card's controller cannot Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon unless they use this card as material.
eff: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to the opponent's field in Defense Position. This card's controller cannot Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon unless they use this card as material.

sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystals

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand to your opponent's field
